inputs.text: A stunning Korean woman caught mid-gasp, jet black hair swept into a sleek high ponytail with wispy face-framing strands. Delicate features, button nose, wide surprised eyes catching neon light reflections. Casual white linen blouse tucked into high-waisted light wash jeans. Standing in a moonlit cherry blossom garden, soft pink petals frozen mid-fall around her. Framed through a traditional wooden arch draped in blossoms. Shot on 85mm f/1.4, creamy bokeh dissolving the garden behind her. High angle looking down, her face tilted up with parted lips in a candid startled moment. Mixed neon pink and cool blue lighting washing across her flawless porcelain skin. Ultra-detailed skin texture, visible pores, cinematic color grading. Dewy glass-skin makeup, gradient coral lips, subtle shimmer highlight on cheekbones.
lowres, blurry, bad anatomy, deformed, watermark, signature, extra fingers, cartoon, anime, painting
